untranslatable_reason: Signal requires option-specific metrics (synthetic spread pricing, implied volatility rank, credit/debit margins, strike spread notionals) which are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal is fundamentally designed for options trading with multi-leg spread mechanics (box, jelly roll, backspread) that cannot be expressed using only futures price/volume indicators. Thresholds for margin percentage, IV rank percentile, and volume percentile are parameterized but cannot be operationalized without options-specific data feeds.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using vol_ratio_20 for volume threshold and hvol_20 for IV rank proxy, but this is a significant degradation of the original signal intent. The signal requires dedicated options market data (implied volatility, option spreads, Greeks) which fall outside the scope of this futures-based indicator library. CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction preserved as specified. Recommend implementing with an options-aware backtesting platform.
